metodos.codigoOriginal:
Private pNot

Local lcIdTab1

Zap In TmpNFis

Wait Window 'Aguarde!!! Selecionando Notas Fiscais...' NoWait

pNot = .f.

If ThisForm.poDataMgr.pcDriver=='sql'
	pNot = 0
EndIf 

If Empty(ThisForm.getUsuars.Value)
	Text To lcQuery NoShow TextMerge PreText 1 + 2 + 4 + 8

		Select a.*, b.Rclis
			From SigMvNfi a
			Left Join SigCdCli b On b.Iclis = a.CliFors
			Where a.Emps = '<<_Empr>>' And
					a.Series = '<<Padr(ThisForm.get_Série.Value, 3)>>' And
					a.Cancelas = <<pNot>> And
					a.Impress = 0... [TRUNCADO]

If thisform.notasant
	Return .f.
EndIf 
Select TmpNFis
If TmpNFis.Flag
	Create Cursor TprMvCab (Emps c(3), Dopes c(20), Numes n(6), ContaOs c(10), ContaDs c(10), ;
						   TpFats c(3), Obses m Null, ValVars n(12,2))

	pEdn = TmpNFis.Emps + TmpNFis.Dopes + Str(TmpNFis.Numes, 6)

	lcQuery = [Select Emps, Dopes, Numes, ContaOs, ContaDs, TpFats, Obses, ValVars ] + ;
			    [From SigMvCab ] + ;
			   [Where EmpDopNums = '] + pEdn + [']

	If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, [crSigMvCab]) < 1)
... [TRUNCADO]

Select TmpNFis

thisform.notasant = .f. 


lcQuery = [Select Series,Emps,VSeqNota ] + ;
		    [ From SigCnFn2 ]  + ;
		    [ Where Series = '] + TmpNFis.Series +  [' And Emps = '] + TmpNFis.Emps + [' And VSeqNota = 1 ]

If (ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lcQuery, [crSigCnFnfT]) < 1)
	=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Conexão (crSigCnFnfT)])
	Return 0
EndIf

If !Eof('crSigCnFnfT')
	If !ThisForm.Verificanf()
		thisform.notasant = .t. 
	EndIf 
EndIf 

Select TmpNFis
Go t... [TRUNCADO]

=fConfigGeral()

Create Cursor TmpNFis (Flag l, Emis d, Series c(3), Operas c(1), CFis c(10), NFis c(6), TotNotas n(12,2), ;
					   Conta c(40), Operacao c(30), Emps c(3), Dopes c(20), Numes n(6))
Index On Nfis Tag Nfis

Create Cursor crClientes (Iclis c(10), RClis c(50))
Index On IClis Tag IClis
* Fim **************************************************************************************

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject([fSqlConector], .Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		.poDataMgr.CursorQuery([SigCdPam], [crSigCdPam], .f., .f., [MascNums])
		If Not Used([crSigCdPam])
			=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Conexão (CursorQuery - crSigCdPam)])
			Return .f.
		EndIf

		.poDataMgr.CursorQuery([SigCdSer], [crSigCdSer], .f., .f., [EmpCods, TipoNfs])
		If Not Used([crSigCdSer])
			=MessageBox([Favor Reinicializar o Processo!!!], 16, [Falha na Con... [TRUNCADO]

If thisform.notasant
	Return .f.
EndIf 
Create Cursor TprMvCab (Emps c(3), Dopes c(20), Numes n(6), ContaOs c(10), ContaDs c(10), ;
					   TpFats c(3), Obses m Null, ValVars n(12,2))
Select TmpNFis
Go Bottom In TmpNFis
ThisForm.grade.Refresh
Go Top In TmpNFis

Select TmpNFis
Scan
	If TmpNFis.Flag
		Wait Window 'Imprimindo Nota Fiscal nº ' + TmpNFis.NFis NoWait

		Zap In TprMvCab

		pEdn = TmpNFis.Emps + TmpNFis.Dopes + Str(TmpNFis.Numes, 6)

		lcQuery = [Select Emps, Dopes, Numes, ContaOs, Cont... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcSerie, lnNota, loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCnFNf', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'Series', This.Value, 'Seleção', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Series', '', 'Código')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = crListaRemota.Series
	Use In crListaRemota
EndIf
This.Refresh

If (Padr(This.Tag, 3) <> Padr(This.Value, 3))
	ThisForm.btnProcessar.Enabled = .t.
EndIf
* Fim **********************... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject([fwBuscaExt], ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, [SigCdUsu], ;
						   [crListaRemota], [Usuarios], This.Value, [Seleção], .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna([Usuarios], [], [Usuário])
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Value = Iif(Lastkey()=27, [], crListaRemota.Usuarios)
	Use In crListaRemota
EndIf
This.Refresh

If (Padr(This.Tag, 10) <> Padr(This.Value, 10))
	ThisForm.btnProcessar.Enabled = .t.
EndIf
* Fim *******... [TRUNCADO]

If ThisForm.SelecionarDados()
	ThisForm.btnProcessar.Enabled = .f.
EndIf
ThisForm.Grade.Refresh
ThisForm.Grade.Column1.Check1.SetFocus
* Fim **************************************************************************************

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select * From TmpNFis Where Flag Into Cursor TmpVNFis

lcSql = [Select Distinct c.Nfis,c.EmpdopNums From SigMvNfi c, SigCdOpe a ]+; 			[Where c.emps = ']+TmpVNFis.Emps+[' And c.series = ']+TmpVNFis.SerieS+[' ]+; 			[And c.Impress = ?llFalse and c.cancelas = ?llFalse And c.dopes = a.dopes and ]+; 			[a.nfiscals in (1,2) and a.tiponfs <> 4 and a.agrupas = 1 ]+; 			[Union all ]+; 		... [TRUNCADO]
lcQuery = [Select Series,Emps,VSeqNota ] + ; 		    [ From SigCnFn2 ]  + ; 		    [ Where Series = '] + TmpNFis.Series +  [' And Emps = '] + TmpNFis.Emps + [' And VSeqNota = 1 ]
